artistIntro.label: About me
artistIntro.bio1: Born in Brazil, based in Porto. I picked up a machine eight years ago and never looked back. My work lives somewhere between realism and feeling, technically solid, but always built around the person wearing it.
artistIntro.bio2: I specialize in anime, gaming, and character tattoos. Whipshading, fine line, and blackwork are where I'm most at home.

process.label: How It Works
process.title: From Idea to Ink
process.description: A simple process built around your vision, from first conversation to finished piece.
process.step1Desc: We talk through your idea, placement, size, and style. No pressure, just an honest conversation about what'll work best on your skin.
process.step2Desc: Every piece is drawn from scratch for you. You'll see the design before we ever touch a needle, adjustments welcome.
process.step3Desc: Session day. Clean studio, focused work, no rush. Aftercare instructions included so your tattoo heals exactly as it should.

about.subtitle: Tattoo Artist · Est. 2016
about.bio: Originally from São Luís, Brazil. Started tattooing in late 2017 after moving to Goiânia, where I did my first apprenticeship. Returned to São Luís in 2018, opened my own studio, and spent a few years refining my craft, picked up four convention awards along the way. In 2024 I made the move to Europe, working first in Spain before settling in Porto in early 2025. Now tattooing at Asgard Tattoo Barber Studio in Porto, and sometimes in Spain.

info.label: The Details
info.title:
Everything You
Need to Know
info.description: Locations, booking process, payment, and what to expect, all in one place.

1.title: Get in touch
1.body: Send a message via WhatsApp or the contact form. Describe your idea, the placement, and your rough size in mind. Photos and references are always welcome.

2.title: Consultation
2.body: We talk through your concept, style, references, placement, and what works best for your body.

3.title: Design & Deposit
3.body: A deposit is required to secure your appointment and cover design time. This comes off the final price.

4.title: Your Session
4.body: Sessions are by appointment only. Bring a snack if you would like, longer pieces may need a break.

5.title: Aftercare
5.body: Proper aftercare affects how your tattoo heals. Full instructions given at the end of your session.

1.title: Price Discussion
1.body: During the consultation we talk through your piece and agree on a price. Pricing is per project, not per hour, based on size, detail, style, and placement.

2.title: Upfront Deposit
2.body: Once the price is agreed, a non-refundable deposit is required to confirm the booking. This covers design time and secures your spot. The deposit is deducted from the final total.

3.title: Final Payment
3.body: The remaining balance is paid on the day, once the tattoo is finished. Cash or bank transfer accepted.

before: Eat a full meal before your appointment
Stay well hydrated the day before and day of
Wear clothing that gives easy access to the area
Avoid alcohol for at least 24 hours beforehand
Shave the area if needed (or ask us to)
after: Keep the tattoo clean, wash gently with mild soap
Apply a thin layer of fragrance-free moisturiser
Avoid sun exposure and soaking for 2–3 weeks
Do not scratch, pick, or rub the healing area
No swimming pools, sea, or saunas during healing
Reach out if something looks off
